title: isodon parvifolius
intro: Isodon parvifolius, also known as small leaf isodon or small leaf isote, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is a perennial herb that is native to China and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion, due to its expectorant and carminative properties. Isodon parvifolius can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
